name: Sicilian Style Sausage
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Pork meat, up to 25% fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the casings.
2. Using a fine disk, grind the pork and chicken meats.
3. Mix the ground meats with the remaining ingredients (fennel seeds, crushed red pepper, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder).
4. Grind again until well combined.
5. Stuff the mixture into the hog or sheep casings.
6. Form the sausages into 3-inch links.
7. Refrigerate the sausages for at least 2 days before serving.
